pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads the opengeos landsat dataset to this path.
Verified against the task description which explicitly instructs saving the DIMAP product to this exact path.
Verified against the task description which explicitly instructs exporting the GeoTIFF to this exact path.
Verified against the task description which requires creating a virtual band named exactly 'MSAVI2'.
Verified against the task description which requires creating a virtual band named exactly 'management_zones'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat 7 TOA imagery downloaded from the opengeos GitHub repository and saved to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The expected output paths (/home/ga/snap_exports/prescription_map.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/management_zones.tif) and derived band names (MSAVI2, management_zones) are verified as exactly matching the explicit instructions given to the agent in the task description.
